Step 9: inv(🦩 ⊗ 🪭) = inv(🧁)    [by ⊗ table]

Step 10: ((🐌 ⊗ 🐌) ⊗ 🦎) = (🪵 ⊗ 🦎)    [by ⊗ table]

Step 11: (🪵 ⊗ 🦎) = 🪵    [by ⊗ table]

Step 6: (🧄 ⊛ inv((🧊 ⊗ 🪨))) = (🧄 ⊛ inv(🧄))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 7: (🧄 ⊛ inv(🧄)) = (🧄 ⊛ 🧊)    [by inv]
Step 8: (🧄 ⊛ 🧊) = inv((🧄 ⊕ 🧊))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 9: inv((🧄 ⊕ 🧊)) = inv(🧊)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 10: inv(🧊) = 🪨    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪨

Step 6: (🪩 ⊗ (🪣 ⊛ inv(🪼))) = (🪩 ⊗ (🪣 ⊛ 🧶))    [by inv transformation]

Step 7: (🪩 ⊗ (🪣 ⊛ 🧶)) = (🪩 ⊗ inv((🪣 ⊗ 🧶)))    [by definition of ⊛]

Step 8: (🪩 ⊗ inv((🪣 ⊗ 🧶))) = (🪩 ⊗ inv(🪩))    [by ⊗ table]

Step 9: (🪩 ⊗ inv(🪩)) = (🪩 ⊗ 🧶)    [by inv transformation]

Step 10: (🪩 ⊗ 🧶) = 🪩    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🪩

Step 5: (🦔 ⊛ (🥟 ⊕ (🪣 ⊕ 🪣))) = (🦔 ⊛ (🥟 ⊕ 🪵))    [by ⊕ table]

Step 6: (🦔 ⊛ (🥟 ⊕ 🪵)) = (🦔 ⊛ 🦔)    [by ⊕ table]

Step 7: (🦔 ⊛ 🦔) = ((🦔 ⊗ 🦔) ⊗ 🦔)    [by definition of ⊛]

Step 8: ((🦔 ⊗ 🦔) ⊗ 🦔) = (🦔 ⊗ 🦔)    [by ⊗ table]

Step 9: (🦔 ⊗ 🦔) = 🦔    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🦔

Step 6: (🧶 ⊛ (🧶 ⊗ inv(🫐))) = (🧶 ⊛ (🧶 ⊗ 🪈))    [by inv]
Step 7: (🧶 ⊛ (🧶 ⊗ 🪈)) = (🧶 ⊛ 🪈)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 8: (🧶 ⊛ 🪈) = inv(🧶 ⊗ 🪈)    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 9: inv(🧶 ⊗ 🪈) = inv(🪈)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 10: inv(🪈) = 🧶    [by inv]

Final Output: 🧶

Step 5: (🧁 ⊗ (🐙 ⊛ (🧁 ⊕ 🧁))) = (🧁 ⊗ (🐙 ⊛ 🫧))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 6: (🧁 ⊗ (🐙 ⊛ 🫧)) = (🧁 ⊗ inv(🐙 ⊕ 🫧))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 7: (🧁 ⊗ inv(🐙 ⊕ 🫧)) = (🧁 ⊗ inv(🧁))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 8: (🧁 ⊗ inv(🧁)) = (🧁 ⊗ 🐙)    [by inv]
Step 9: (🧁 ⊗ 🐙) = 🐙    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🐙

Step 9: inv((🪻 ⊛ (🐌 ⊕ (🪼 ⊞ 🐌)))) = inv((🪻 ⊛ (🐌 ⊕ ((🪼 ⊕ 🪼) ⊕ 🐌))))    [by definition of ⊞]

Step 10: inv((🪻 ⊛ (🐌 ⊕ ((🪼 ⊕ 🪼) ⊕ 🐌)))) = inv((🪻 ⊛ (🐌 ⊕ (🪻 ⊕ 🐌))))    [by ⊕ table]

Step 11: inv((🪻 ⊛ (🐌 ⊕ (🪻 ⊕ 🐌)))) = inv((🪻 ⊛ ((🐌 ⊕ 🪻) ⊕ 🐌)))    [by associativity of ⊕]

Step 12: inv((🪻 ⊛ ((🐌 ⊕ 🪻) ⊕ 🐌))) = inv((🪻 ⊛ (🪻 ⊕ 🐌)))    [by ⊕ table]

Step 13: inv((🪻 ⊛ (🪻 ⊕ 🐌))) = inv(((🪻 ⊗ (🪻 ⊕ 🐌)) ⊗ 🪻))    [by definition of ⊛]

Step 14: inv(((🪻 ⊗ (🪻 ⊕ 🐌)) ⊗ 🪻)) = inv(((🪻 ⊗ 🐌) ⊗ 🪻))    [by ⊗ table]

Step 15: inv(((🪻 ⊗ 🐌) ⊗ 🪻)) = inv((🪻 ⊗ 🪻))    [by ⊗ table]

Step 16: inv((🪻 ⊗ 🪻)) = inv(🪸)    [by ⊗ table]

Step 17: inv(🪸) = 🧶    [by inv]

Final Output: 🧶

Step 9: (🪤 ⊛ (inv((🪨 ⊛ 🐌)) ⊗ 🪭)) = (🪤 ⊛ (inv(inv((🪨 ⊕ 🐌))) ⊗ 🪭))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 10: (🪤 ⊛ (inv(inv((🪨 ⊕ 🐌))) ⊗ 🪭)) = (🪤 ⊛ ((🪨 ⊕ 🐌) ⊗ 🪭))    [by double inv]
Step 11: (🪤 ⊛ ((🪨 ⊕ 🐌) ⊗ 🪭)) = (🪤 ⊛ (🫑 ⊗ 🪭))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 12: (🪤 ⊛ (🫑 ⊗ 🪭)) = (🪤 ⊛ 🫑)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 13: (🪤 ⊛ 🫑) = inv((🪤 ⊕ 🫑))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 14: inv((🪤 ⊕ 🫑)) = inv(🦎)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 15: inv(🦎) = 🫑    [by inv]

Final Output: 🫑

Step 8: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(rot((🐌 ⊗ 🧊)))))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(rot(🐌)))))    [by ⊗ table]

Step 9: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(rot(🐌))))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(🪸))))    [by rot transformation]

Step 10: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ rot(🪸)))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ 🫑)))    [by rot transformation]

Step 11: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🫑 ⊞ 🫑))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot(((🫑 ⊕ 🫑) ⊕ 🫑)))    [by definition of ⊞]

Step 12: (🪆 ⊗ rot(((🫑 ⊕ 🫑) ⊕ 🫑))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot((🪆 ⊕ 🫑)))    [by ⊕ table]

Step 13: (🪆 ⊗ rot((🪆 ⊕ 🫑))) = (🪆 ⊗ rot(🪤))    [by ⊕ table]

Step 14: (🪆 ⊗ rot(🪤)) = (🪆 ⊗ 🧊)    [by rot transformation]

Step 15: (🪆 ⊗ 🧊) = 🪸    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🪸

Step 9: (🪵 ⊞ rot((🪭 ⊛ rot(🧁)))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot((🪭 ⊛ 🐙)))    [by rot]
Step 10: (🪵 ⊞ rot((🪭 ⊛ 🐙))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot(((🪭 ⊗ 🪭) ⊗ 🐙)))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 11: (🪵 ⊞ rot(((🪭 ⊗ 🪭) ⊗ 🐙))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot((🧁 ⊗ 🐙)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 12: (🪵 ⊞ rot((🧁 ⊗ 🐙))) = (🪵 ⊞ rot(🥟))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 13: (🪵 ⊞ rot(🥟)) = (🪵 ⊞ 🪭)    [by rot]
Step 14: (🪵 ⊞ 🪭) = inv(🪵 ⊕ 🪭)    [by definition of ⊞]
Step 15: inv(🪵 ⊕ 🪭) = inv(🧁)    [by ⊕ table]
Step 16: inv(🧁) = 🥟    [by inv]

Final Output: 🥟

Step 9: rot((🪆 ⊗ (((🪣 ⊗ 🪸) ⊛ inv(🪸)) ⊕ 🪈))) = rot((🪆 ⊗ (((🪨) ⊛ inv(🪸)) ⊕ 🪈)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 10: rot((🪆 ⊗ (((🪨) ⊛ inv(🪸)) ⊕ 🪈))) = rot((🪆 ⊗ ((((🪨 ⊗ 🪨) ⊗ inv(🪸))) ⊕ 🪈)))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 11: rot((🪆 ⊗ ((((🪨 ⊗ 🪨) ⊗ inv(🪸))) ⊕ 🪈))) = rot((🪆 ⊗ (((🪣 ⊗ inv(🪸)) ⊕ 🪈)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 12: rot((🪆 ⊗ (((🪣 ⊗ inv(🪸)) ⊕ 🪈))) = rot((🪆 ⊗ (((🪣 ⊗ 🪈) ⊕ 🪈)))    [by inv transformation]
Step 13: rot((🪆 ⊗ (((🪣 ⊗ 🪈) ⊕ 🪈))) = rot((🪆 ⊗ ((🪨 ⊕ 🪈)))    [by ⊗ table]
Step 14: rot((🪆 ⊗ ((🪨 ⊕ 🪈))) = rot((🪆 ⊗ 🪨))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 15: rot((🪆 ⊗ 🪨)) = rot(🪈)    [by ⊗ table]
Step 16: rot(🪈) = 🫐    [by rot transformation]

Final Output: 🫐

Step 8: inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ (🫐 ⊞ 🪵)))) = inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ ((🫐 ⊗ 🫐) ⊗ 🪵))))    [by definition of ⊞]

Step 9: inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ ((🫐 ⊗ 🫐) ⊗ 🪵)))) = inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ (🫐 ⊗ 🪵))))    [by ⊗ table]

Step 10: inv(rot((🪭 ⊞ (🫐 ⊗ 🪵)))) = inv(rot(((🪭 ⊗ 🪭) ⊗ (🫐 ⊗ 🪵))))    [by definition of ⊞]

Step 11: inv(rot(((🪭 ⊗ 🪭) ⊗ (🫐 ⊗ 🪵)))) = inv(rot((🪭 ⊗ (🫐 ⊗ 🪵))))    [by ⊗ table]

Step 12: inv(rot((🪭 ⊗ (🫐 ⊗ 🪵)))) = inv(rot((🪭 ⊗ 🧿)))    [by ⊗ table]

Step 13: inv(rot((🪭 ⊗ 🧿))) = inv(rot(🪈))    [by ⊗ table]

Step 14: inv(rot(🪈)) = inv(🫐)    [by rot]

Step 15: inv(🫐) = 🧿    [by inv]

Final Output: 🧿

Step 8: (inv(🧶) ⊗ rot(((🧿 ⊛ 🦎) ⊕ inv(🦎)))) = (🦎 ⊗ rot(((🧿 ⊛ 🦎) ⊕ inv(🦎))))    [by inv]
Step 9: (🦎 ⊗ rot(((🧿 ⊛ 🦎) ⊕ inv(🦎)))) = (🦎 ⊗ rot(((🧿 ⊕ 🧿) ⊕ inv(🦎))))    [by definition of ⊛]
Step 10: (🦎 ⊗ rot(((🧿 ⊕ 🧿) ⊕ inv(🦎)))) = (🦎 ⊗ rot((🧿 ⊕ inv(🦎))))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 11: (🦎 ⊗ rot((🧿 ⊕ inv(🦎)))) = (🦎 ⊗ rot((🧿 ⊕ 🪻)))    [by inv]
Step 12: (🦎 ⊗ rot((🧿 ⊕ 🪻))) = (🦎 ⊗ rot(🌵))    [by ⊕ table]
Step 13: (🦎 ⊗ rot(🌵)) = (🦎 ⊗ 🧶)    [by rot]
Step 14: (🦎 ⊗ 🧶) = 🧶    [by ⊗ table]

Final Output: 🧶

Step 9: ((🥟 ⊕ (🥟 ⊞ rot(🪵))) ⊞ 🫐) = ((🥟 ⊕ (🥟 ⊞ 🫐)) ⊞ 🫐)    [by rot]

Step 10: ((🥟 ⊕ (🥟 ⊞ 🫐)) ⊞ 🫐) = ((🥟 ⊕ inv(🥟 ⊕ 🫐)) ⊞ 🫐)    [by definition of ⊞]

Step 11: ((🥟 ⊕ inv(🥟 ⊕ 🫐)) ⊞ 🫐) = ((🥟 ⊕ inv(🪸)) ⊞ 🫐)    [by ⊕ table]

Step 12: ((🥟 ⊕ inv(🪸)) ⊞ 🫐) = ((🥟 ⊕ 🫐) ⊞ 🫐)    [by inv]

Step 13: ((🥟 ⊕ 🫐) ⊞ 🫐) = (🪸 ⊞ 🫐)    [by ⊕ table]

Step 14: (🪸 ⊞ 🫐) = inv(🪸 ⊕ 🫐)    [by definition of ⊞]

Step 15: inv(🪸 ⊕ 🫐) = inv(🥟)    [by ⊕ table]

Step 16: inv(🥟) = 🪭    [by inv]

Final Output: 🪭

Step 9: (rot((🥟 ⊕ 🪬)) ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))) = (rot(🥟) ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭))))    [by ⊕ table]

Step 10: (rot(🥟) ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))) = (🪭 ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭))))    [by rot]

Step 11: (🪭 ⊞ inv(rot((🥟 ⊗ 🪭)))) = (🪭 ⊞ inv(rot(🥟)))    [by ⊗ table]

Step 12: (🪭 ⊞ inv(rot(🥟))) = (🪭 ⊞ inv(🪭))    [by rot]

Step 13: (🪭 ⊞ inv(🪭)) = (🪭 ⊞ 🧊)    [by inv]

Step 14: (🪭 ⊞ 🧊) = ((🪭 ⊕ 🪭) ⊕ 🧊)    [by definition of ⊞]

Step 15: ((🪭 ⊕ 🪭) ⊕ 🧊) = (🪈 ⊕ 🧊)    [by ⊕ table]

Step 16: (🪈 ⊕ 🧊) = 🪈    [by ⊕ table]

Final Output: 🪈
